name: interplanet-ltx
description: LTX (Light-Time eXchange) SDK — structured interplanetary meeting protocol for all solar system bodies.
author: InterPlanet contributors

scripts.test: node -e "const sdk = require('./ltx-sdk'); console.assert(typeof sdk.createPlan === 'function', 'createPlan ok'); console.assert(typeof sdk.computeSegments === 'function', 'computeSegments ok'); console.assert(typeof sdk.encodeHash === 'function', 'encodeHash ok'); console.log('smoke tests passed');"
